name: Panim
street_level_visibility: Half-Elves remain primary, with Humans and Elves retained as the most coherent secondary populations for a central religious and afterlife-mediating polity.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Panim should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
